profile.bio: Marketplace-operated provider account for Fast-hosted data services.

service.name: LinkedIn Profile Scraper
service.tagline: Enrich LinkedIn profile URLs with work history, education, and discovered contact data through a Fast-native async proxy.
service.about: LinkedIn Profile Scraper exposes an Apify-backed enrichment workflow through the marketplace for profile intelligence, recruiting, sales research, and lead enrichment from direct LinkedIn profile URLs.
service.promptIntro: I want to use the LinkedIn Profile Scraper service on Fast Marketplace.
setupInstructions: Fund a Fast wallet on mainnet.
Provide one or more LinkedIn profile URLs to enrich.
Keep the returned job token and poll the marketplace job route for completion.

endpoints.title: Profile Enrichment
endpoints.description: Extract LinkedIn profile details, work history, education, and discovered contact info from profile URLs.
endpoints.usageNotes: Use direct profile URLs when you already know the people you want to enrich and need full normalized profile data back.
